Grouperry
Sign inGet started
Group deals · Real products · Clear checkout

Online shoppers team up to unlock bulk-style prices—without buying extra alone.

You pick a live deal, join buyers who want the same item, and pay the lower group rate at checkout when enough people commit.

Browse deals & join free
Simple by design

How It Works

From your first browse to a locked-in group price—four clear steps.

01
Find or Create a Deal
Browse existing group deals or start your own. Our AI helps match you with the perfect buying groups.
02
Invite Your Circle
Share with friends, family, or connect with other buyers interested in the same products.
03
Reach the Goal
Once enough people join, the group deal is activated and everyone gets the discounted price.
04
Everyone Saves
Complete your purchase at the group price. No hidden fees, no surprises.

Ready to pay less on your next purchase?

Create a free account and join an active deal in under a minute.

Browse deals & join free
Social proof

Trust you can see—and measure

Verified profiles, moderated listings, and secure checkout—backed by usage stats and real member feedback.

  • 847+Deals live now

  • 94%Would join another deal

What members say

  • “I finally stopped paying full price for things I was going to buy anyway. Our group locked in under two days.”

    Sarah M.

    Hobby & electronics buyer

  • “Clear rules and real humans when something looked off. That's rare in online marketplaces.”

    James L.

    Repeat group buyer

  • “Saved on a bundle I split with family—checkout felt straightforward, no surprise fees.”

    Priya K.

    Home & subscriptions

How we protect buyers & organizers

Verified Members

Every member is verified to ensure safe and reliable group buying experiences.

Community Ratings

See ratings and reviews from other members before joining any group deal.

Active Moderation

Our team monitors all deals to prevent fraud and ensure fair practices.

Direct Messaging

Communicate directly with group organizers and members.

Secure Transactions

All payments are processed securely with buyer protection.

Popular Categories

Shop categories you already use—at lower prices when the group fills.

Latest gadgets & tech at group prices
